testcase.name: kFind modal should open the kFind modal with Ctrl+K and display the search input
testcase.classname: should open the kFind modal with Ctrl+K and display the search input

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 10000ms: Expected to find element: `.search-modal`, but never found it.
